hero.headline: Transforming Workplaces. Saving Lives. Powering the Future.
hero.subheadline: Senior HSE Consultant, Trainer, and AI & Digital Solutions Specialist — delivering safety excellence, regulatory compliance, and digital transformation across 40+ countries and every major industry.

why_choose.title: Global Field Experience
why_choose.text: Deployed across 40+ countries in oil & gas, construction, manufacturing, and beyond. Real-world expertise, not just theory.

why_choose.title: Digital-First Approach
why_choose.text: The only HSE consultant who builds AI agents, Power BI dashboards, and SharePoint safety portals — bridging the gap between safety and technology.

why_choose.title: Certified Trainer & Coach
why_choose.text: NEBOSH and IOSH certified trainer with a 97%+ exam pass rate across ASP, CSP, CRSP, NEBOSH, IOSH, and ISO programs.

cta_banner.headline: Ready to Transform Your Safety Culture?
cta_banner.subtext: Whether you need a compliance audit, a Power BI dashboard, AI-powered tools, or NEBOSH coaching — let's start with a free 30-minute consultation.

services_section.headline: Everything Your Organisation Needs — Under One Roof
services_section.description: From field-proven HSE consulting and certification coaching to AI-powered analytics and custom digital platforms — Ansar Mahmood delivers where other consultants stop. One advisor. Full-spectrum capability.

industries_section.headline: Deep Expertise Across Every Major Sector
industries_section.description: With 25+ years of field deployment across 40+ countries, Ansar Mahmood brings sector-specific knowledge to every engagement.

featured_solutions.headline: From Compliance to Culture — Strategic Safety That Actually Works
featured_solutions.description: Ansar Mahmood brings 25+ years of frontline HSE experience to your boardroom. Whether you need a regulatory compliance audit, a safety culture transformation program, or a complete HSE management system built from scratch — the approach is always strategic, practical, and results-focused.
features: Regulatory compliance audit and gap analysis
Safety culture transformation and behavioral programs
Emergency response planning and BCP development
featured_solutions.label: Expert Advisory

featured_solutions.headline: The Future of Safety Is Intelligent — Let AI Work for You
featured_solutions.description: Ansar deploys custom AI agents, predictive analytics models, and Power BI dashboards that give your HSE team the intelligence to prevent incidents before they happen. No generic software — these are purpose-built tools designed specifically for your operations.
features: AI HSE document review and compliance assistant
Power BI real-time safety KPI dashboards
SharePoint HSE portals and document management
Custom safety apps and digital inspection tools
featured_solutions.label: AI Technology
